ogTitle: Woorinen North vs Woorinen South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Woorinen North and Woorinen South.
heading: Woorinen North vs Woorinen South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Woorinen North, Victoria and Woorinen South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Woorinen North has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Woorinen South (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Woorinen North or Woorinen South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Woorinen North has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Woorinen South scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Woorinen North scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Woorinen South scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Woorinen North or Woorinen South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Woorinen North has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
